result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= date
LINE 8:     AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
                              ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH recent_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate <  DATE '2023-09-02'
), assignment_counts AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) AS assign_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), non_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT rc.case_id,
         rc.owner_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (rc.closeddate - rc.createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM recent_cases rc
  LEFT JOIN assignment_counts ac ON ac.case_id = rc.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(ac.assign_cnt, 0) <= 1
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS total_cases
  FROM (
    SELECT c.id AS case_id,
           c.ownerid AS agent_id
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
      AND c.createddate <  DATE '2023-09-02'

    UNION ALL

    SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
           ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
      AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
      AND c.createddate <  DATE '2023-09-02'
  ) t
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY agent_id
), agent_aht AS (
  SELECT nt.owner_id AS agent_id,
         AVG(nt.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds,
         COUNT(*) AS non_transferred_closed_cases
  FROM non_transferred_cases nt
  GROUP BY nt.owner_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id
FROM agent_aht a
JOIN agent_case_counts acc ON acc.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE acc.total_cases > 1
  AND a.non_transferred_closed_cases > 0
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH recent_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate <  DATE '2023-09-02'
), assignment_counts AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) AS assign_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), non_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT rc.case_id,
         rc.owner_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (rc.closeddate - rc.createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM recent_cases rc
  LEFT JOIN assignment_counts ac ON ac.case_id = rc.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(ac.assign_cnt, 0) <= 1
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS total_cases
  FROM (
    SELECT c.id AS case_id,
           c.ownerid AS agent_id
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
      AND c.createddate <  DATE '2023-09-02'

    UNION ALL

    SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
           ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
      AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
      AND c.createddate <  DATE '2023-09-02'
  ) t
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY agent_id
), agent_aht AS (
  SELECT nt.owner_id AS agent_id,
         AVG(nt.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds,
         COUNT(*) AS non_transferred_closed_cases
  FROM non_transferred_cases nt
  GROUP BY nt.owner_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id
FROM agent_aht a
JOIN agent_case_counts acc ON acc.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE acc.total_cases > 1
  AND a.non_transferred_closed_cases > 0
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

WITH recent_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'

  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'

  SELECT rc.case_id,
         rc.owner_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (rc.closeddate - rc.createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM recent_cases rc
  LEFT JOIN assignment_counts ac ON ac.case_id = rc.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(ac.assign_cnt, 0) <= 1
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS total_cases
  FROM (
    SELECT c.id AS case_id,
           c.ownerid AS agent_id
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
      AND c.createddate <  DATE '2023-09-02'

    UNION ALL

    SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
           ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
      AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
      AND c.createddate <  DATE '2023-09-02'
  ) t
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY agent_id
), agent_aht AS (
  SELECT nt.owner_id AS agent_id,
         AVG(nt.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds,
         COUNT(*) AS non_transferred_closed_cases
  FROM non_transferred_cases nt
  GROUP BY nt.owner_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id
FROM agent_aht a
JOIN agent_case_counts acc ON acc.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE acc.total_cases > 1
  AND a.non_transferred_closed_cases > 0
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH recent_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
         c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02'
), assignment_counts AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) AS assign_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), non_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT rc.case_id,
         rc.owner_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (rc.closed_ts - rc.created_ts)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM recent_cases rc
  LEFT JOIN assignment_counts ac ON ac.case_id = rc.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(ac.assign_cnt, 0) <= 1
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS total_cases
  FROM (
    SELECT c.id AS case_id,
           c.ownerid AS agent_id
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02'
      AND c.createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02'

    UNION ALL

    SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
           ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
    WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
      AND c.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02'
      AND c.createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02'
  ) t
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY agent_id
), agent_aht AS (
  SELECT nt.owner_id AS agent_id,
         AVG(nt.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds,
         COUNT(*) AS non_transferred_closed_cases
  FROM non_transferred_cases nt
  GROUP BY nt.owner_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id
FROM agent_aht a
JOIN agent_case_counts acc ON acc.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE acc.total_cases > 1
  AND a.non_transferred_closed_cases > 0
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;
